query:
SELECT 'bills_of_lading' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM bills_of_lading WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'customers', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'vehicles', COUNT(*) FROM vehicles WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'bl_vehicles', COUNT(*) FROM bl_vehicles
UNION ALL SELECT 'tracking_codes', COUNT(*) FROM tracking_codes
UNION ALL SELECT 'tracking_history', COUNT(*) FROM tracking_history
UNION ALL SELECT 'audit_log', COUNT(*) FROM audit_log;

UNION ALL SELECT 'customers', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'vehicles', COUNT(*) FROM vehicles WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'bl_vehicles', COUNT(*) FROM bl_vehicles
UNION ALL SELECT 'tracking_codes', COUNT(*) FROM tracking_codes
